title: Automate Moving of Project boards from one folder within a Workspace to another folder in the same Workspace

posts.author: Asha (Ash Abbott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to be able to automate the moving of completed projects boards from one folder within a Workspace (Active Projects) to another folder in the same Workspace (Inactive Projects). Specifically, when the Status of the board in it’s portfolio changes to complete. I have an automation where the project is moved over to a new Inactive portfolio, but can’t seem to figure out how to get the board to move from the sidebar folder for Active Projects to the appropriate Inactive Projects folder (same workspace).

What are you trying to achieve

saving time with clerical tasks at project end.
